summary: This pack is the smallest truthful release-proven secondary search-backed business bundle for topic_brief today. It combines the fresh healthy proof summary, a fresh bundle baseline summary, a fresh Workflow Case recap, and the shared storefront demo-status ledger while preserving news_digest as the only official first public baseline.
known_gaps: topic_brief is now a release-proven secondary business path, but news_digest retains the official first public baseline.
The current topic_brief bundle does not prove hosted production readiness, broad multi-run benchmark coverage, or public write-capable MCP.
